mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tb_audit_form.id) FROM tb_audit_form_flow_detail INNER JOIN tb_audit_form_flow ON tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_form_flow_id = tb_audit_form_flow.id INNER JOIN tb_audit_form ON tb_audit_form_flow.audit_form_id = tb_audit_form.id WHERE tb_audit_form_flow.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_status = 3

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tb_audit_form.id) FROM tb_audit_form_flow_detail INNER JOIN tb_audit_form_flow ON tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_form_flow_id = tb_audit_form_flow.id INNER JOIN tb_audit_form ON tb_audit_form_flow.audit_form_id = tb_audit_form.id WHERE tb_audit_form_flow.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_status IN (4, 5)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit_form WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND audit_status = 3

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tb_audit_form.id) FROM tb_audit_form_flow_detail INNER JOIN tb_audit_form_flow ON tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_form_flow_id = tb_audit_form_flow.id INNER JOIN tb_audit_form ON tb_audit_form_flow.audit_form_id = tb_audit_form.id WHERE tb_audit_form_flow.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.approval_type = 'cc' AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_status = 7
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_user WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND user_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_department WHERE is_deleted = 0

SELECT tb_audit_form.id, tb_audit_form.approval_name, CASE tb_audit_form.audit_status WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '已提交' WHEN 3 THEN '审批中' WHEN 4 THEN '已通过' WHEN 5 THEN '已拒绝' WHEN 6 THEN '已撤回' ELSE '' END AS auditStatusDesc, DATE_FORMAT(tb_audit_form.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createTime FROM tb_audit_form_flow_detail INNER JOIN tb_audit_form_flow ON tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_form_flow_id = tb_audit_form_flow.id INNER JOIN tb_audit_form ON tb_audit_form_flow.audit_form_id = tb_audit_form.id WHERE tb_audit_form_flow.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND tb_audit_form_flow_detail.audit_status = 3 GROUP BY tb_audit_form.id ORDER BY tb_audit_form.create_time DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT tb_announcement.id, tb_announcement.title, tb_announcement_type.type_name AS typeName, DATE_FORMAT(tb_announcement.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createTime FROM tb_announcement LEFT JOIN tb_announcement_type ON tb_announcement.announcement_type_id = tb_announcement_type.id AND tb_announcement_type.is_deleted = 0 WHERE tb_announcement.is_deleted = 0 AND tb_announcement.is_enable = 1 ORDER BY tb_announcement.create_time DESC LIMIT 5
